articles.title: BREAKING: Elon Musk Gets Involved in Fake Bitcoin Spot ETF Drama – He Tweeted About Dogecoin
articles.description: According to the latest development, Elon Musk also made his comment after the SEC's Twitter account was hacked and a fake Tweet was sent about the approval of Bitcoin Spot ETFs. Under a post making fun of the hacking of the SEC's Twitter account and discussing what the SEC's Twitter password could be, Musk wrote […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: Elon Musk Gets Involved in Fake Bitcoin...

articles.title: BREAKING: Gary Gensler Says SEC’s X Account Hacked, Bitcoin Spot ETFs Not Yet Approved
articles.description: According to the SEC chairman's statement, the post announcing the approval of Bitcoin Spot ETFs was made by the hacker who took over the SEC's official X account. So currently Bitcoin Spot ETFs have not received official approval. On the other hand, the relevant confirmation post was deleted from the SEC's Twitter account. Gensler said […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: Gary Gensler Says...

articles.title: Fox Launches Protocol for Content Verification on Polygon
articles.description: 89,000 pieces of content have been registered so far.

articles.title: Huge Claim: “CEO of the Company with Bitcoin Spot ETF Application Says Ripple (XRP) Spot ETF is Next”
articles.description: According to journalist Jacquelyn Melinek's claim, Valkyrie CEO said that after Bitcoin Spot ETF, it is Ripple's turn. Continue Reading: Huge Claim: “CEO of the Company with Bitcoin Spot ETF Application Says Ripple (XRP) Spot ETF is Next”

articles.title: Global Mega Bank Standard Chartered Releases Bullish Forecast For Spot Bitcoin ETFs
articles.description: Standard Chartered Bank is the latest to give its predictions on the impact Spot Bitcoin ETFs could have on Bitcoin’s price in the long term. The bank took a bullish stance as they predicted that BTC could rise to unprecedented heights by the end of 2025. Bitcoin Could Hit $200,000 By End Of 2024 According to a report by Standard Chartered shared on the X (formerly Twitter) platform, BTC’s...

articles.title: Solana now boasts more than 2,500 monthly active developers
articles.description: The Solana Foundation notched a 50% increase in developer retention on the network over the last three months.
